# Repository About metadata

Use this file as the source for the GitHub repository About panel and discovery metadata.

## Description

```text
Local-authoritative, open-source relationship memory and attention system with Markdown data, native desktop and CLI, provider-neutral connections, and privacy-first automation.
```

## Website

Leave blank until a maintained project site or documentation deployment exists.

## Suggested topics

```text
relationship-manager
personal-crm
local-first
local-authoritative
markdown
rust
tauri
privacy
self-hosted
obsidian
logseq
mcp
accessibility

```

## Claim boundary

Do not use `production-ready`, `secure`, `compliant`, `notarized`, `cross-platform release`, `sync`, or named provider support in repository metadata until the corresponding release evidence exists. `Local-first` may be used for discovery, but product documentation should prefer the stricter term `local-authoritative`.
